image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you cells have a built-in lifespan?
Context visual: This is the Hayflick limit—where cells can only divide about 50 times.
Escalation visual: Every time they divide, they're inching closer to aging.
Evidence visual: This limit stems from telomere shortening. When telomeres are too short, cells stop dividing.
Payoff visual: Understanding this can unlock secrets to aging and health. But, we’re still learning.
Cta visual: Curious about how science can extend our lives? Hit that follow button!
